about.title: About
about.intro: Hi, I'm a developer who loves building things for the web. This site is my corner of the internet — a place to share what I learn, showcase projects I'm working on, and document the journey.
about.whatIDoContent: I focus on modern web development, exploring the intersection of design and engineering. I'm particularly interested in frameworks that push the boundaries of what's possible on the web — React Server Components, edge computing, and AI-assisted workflows.
about.whyAgentNativeContent: This site is built with an agent-native philosophy. Every part of the stack — from content creation to deployment — is designed to work seamlessly with AI agents. It's not just about using AI tools; it's about architecting systems where human creativity and machine efficiency complement each other.
about.theStackContent: This site is built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, and a growing collection of modern tools. It's designed to be fast, accessible, and easy to maintain — a living experiment in what a modern personal site can be.
about.getInTouchContent: Feel free to reach out if you want to chat about web development, open source, or anything tech. I'm always happy to connect with fellow builders.
